title: JavaScript for Beginners
description: Go from zero to writing real JavaScript. Learn the language that makes the web interactive.
longDescription: JavaScript is the programming language of the web. It's what makes buttons click, forms validate, and pages come alive. In this course we start from the very basics and build up to real programs you can actually use. No prior experience needed — just curiosity.
whatYouLearn: Control flow with if/else and loops

lessons.title: What is JavaScript?
lessons.description: Understand what JavaScript is, where it runs, and why it's the most popular programming language in the world.

lessons.title: Variables & Data Types
lessons.description: Learn about var, let, const, and the different types of data JavaScript can hold.

lessons.title: Operators & Expressions
lessons.description: Arithmetic, comparison, and logical operators. Write your first expressions and understand truthiness.

lessons.title: If/Else & Conditionals
lessons.description: Make your code make decisions. Write if, else if, else, and ternary expressions.

lessons.title: Loops
lessons.description: Repeat actions with for, while, and forEach loops. Understand when to use each one.

lessons.title: Functions
lessons.description: Write reusable blocks of code with function declarations, expressions, and arrow functions.

lessons.title: Arrays
lessons.description: Store and manipulate lists of data. Learn map, filter, reduce, and other array methods.

lessons.title: Objects
lessons.description: Work with key-value pairs to represent real-world data. Understand properties and methods.

lessons.title: DOM Manipulation
lessons.description: Select, modify, and create HTML elements from JavaScript. Make your pages dynamic.

lessons.title: Events
lessons.description: Respond to user actions: clicks, key presses, form submissions, and more.

lessons.title: Async JavaScript & Fetch
lessons.description: Understand promises, async/await, and fetch data from real APIs.

lessons.title: Project: Build a To-Do App
lessons.description: Put everything together and build a complete to-do app with local storage. Your first real project.
